commands.review_summary:
Raises embedded agent live tool-result auto caps from 16K/32K to 32K/64K so larger inline tool payloads can avoid truncation.

PR surface: Source 0. Total 0 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction was established for the Windows node workflow. Source inspection does show that a 25K inline text payload exceeds the current 16K low-context live tool-result cap and would be truncated on that path.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed because the remaining blockers are contributor real behavior proof and maintainer acceptance of a broad runtime default change, not a repair automation can prove for the contributor.

target.title: fix(tool-result): increase default max tool result chars for larger payloads
target.body:
## Summary

When using `nodes invoke` with `screen.snapshot`, the base64-encoded PNG payload (~25K chars for 1920x1280) gets truncated at 16K, making the screenshot unusable.

## Fix

- Increased `DEFAULT_MAX_LIVE_TOOL_RESULT_CHARS` from 16K to 32K
- Increased `LARGE_CONTEXT_MAX_LIVE_TOOL_RESULT_CHARS` from 32K to 64K

This allows larger tool result payloads (base64 screenshots, long file outputs) to pass through without truncation.

Closes #94280

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior addressed:** base64 screenshot payloads truncated at 16K chars, making them invalid.

**Real environment tested:** Code change validated at source level - the constant change is the only limiting factor for tool result size.

**Evidence after fix:** Changed constants ensure 25K+ payloads pass through without head+tail truncation.

**What was not tested:** Not tested against a live Windows node with screen.snapshot.
target.author: monkey-wusky
